projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work in e-commerce and web analytics.

imovelRadar.title: Imovel Radar
imovelRadar.description: Tracks 4,900+ active listings, running daily at 8AM to detect and deliver new properties in real time via Telegram.

maceioCine.title: Maceió Cine Bot
maceioCine.description: Eliminated Playwright entirely by reverse-engineering internal API endpoints — cutting payload 86% (109KB → 14.6KB) and enabling free deployment on Render.

jobHunterAi.title: Job Hunter AI
jobHunterAi.description: Evaluates 1,000 job listings for ~$0.13, autonomously matching opportunities to my resume and logging results to Google Sheets.

shopifyBundle.title: Shopify Advanced Bundle
shopifyBundle.description: Proof of concept demonstrating advanced Shopify bundling with a lightweight frontend stack — built to explore conversion-focused custom commerce logic.

about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I build real products that solve real problems—real estate bots on Telegram, cinema listings scrapers, AI agents for job hunting. I've shipped code to production for international SaaS platforms, working in distributed teams across Brazil, Portugal, and the US.
about.paragraph2: I'm equally comfortable architecting backend systems, building React frontends, or scripting automation. What matters to me is solving the problem efficiently—whether that's optimizing database queries or simplifying complex logic so it just works.
about.paragraph3: Based in Maceió, Brazil. Open to remote freelance projects and full-time roles. If you need someone who ships, let's talk.
